 -Justifications : csuyb|Type|Robot, Robot|SubClassOf|Agent, csuyb|hasCapability|xxc, xxc|isCapabilityOf|csuyb, csuyb|hasComponent|hozh, hozh|Type|MechanicalHand, MechanicalHand|SubClassOf|Gripper, csuyb|hasComponent|lzwsj, lzwsj|Type|MechanicalHand, MechanicalHand|SubClassOf|Gripper, sqi|Type|OvenTray, OvenTray|SubClassOf|Object, sqi|hasDisposition|soqz, soqz|isDispositionOf|sqi, sqi|hasPart|xnadv, xnadv|Type|Handle, Handle|SubClassOf|HoldablePart, sqi|hasPart|wwblf, wwblf|Type|Handle, Handle|SubClassOf|HoldablePart, sqi|isTouchableBy|csuyb, hozh|Type|Gripper, Gripper|SubClassOf|EndEffector, csuyb|hasComponent|hozh, hozh|hasWeightLimit|integer#13, sqi|hasWeight|integer#10, lesserThan(integer#10,integer#13) 
 -Rules : Agent(?a), hasCapability(?a, ?c), LiftingCapability(?c), Object(?o), hasDisposition(?o, ?d), LiftableDisposition(?d), isTouchableBy(?o,?a), EndEffector(?g), hasComponent(?a,?g), hasWeightLimit(?g,?w1), hasWeight(?o,?w2), lesserThan(?w2,?w1) -> canLift(?a, ?o)
	LiftingCapability|EquivalentTo|(isCapabilityOf some (hasComponent min 2 Gripper)
	LiftableDisposition|EquivalentTo|(isDispositionOf some (hasPart min 2 HoldablePart))
answers.answer: the robot can lift the oven tray because it has a lifting capability based on having at least two grippers as components, and the oven tray being liftable due to having at least two holdable parts that are part of it.
